class.name: ScriptBacktrace
class.brief_description: A captured backtrace of a specific script language.
class.description: [ScriptBacktrace] holds an already captured backtrace of a specific script language, such as GDScript or C#, which are captured using [method Engine.capture_script_backtraces].

method.name: get_frame_count
method.description: Returns the number of stack frames in the backtrace.

method.name: get_frame_file
method.description: Returns the file name of the call site represented by the stack frame at the specified index.

method.name: get_frame_function
method.description: Returns the name of the function called at the stack frame at the specified index.

method.name: get_frame_line
method.description: Returns the line number of the call site represented by the stack frame at the specified index.

method.name: get_global_variable_count
method.description: Returns the number of global variables (e.g. autoload singletons) in the backtrace. [b]Note:[/b] This will be non-zero only if the [code]include_variables[/code] parameter was [code]true[/code] when capturing the backtrace with [method Engine.capture_script_backtraces].

method.name: get_global_variable_name
method.description: Returns the name of the global variable at the specified index.

method.name: get_global_variable_value
method.description: Returns the [String] value of the global variable at the specified index.

method.name: get_language_name
method.description: Returns the name of the script language that this backtrace was captured from.

method.name: get_local_variable_count
method.description: Returns the number of local variables in the stack frame at the specified index. [b]Note:[/b] This will be non-zero only if the [code]include_variables[/code] parameter was [code]true[/code] when capturing the backtrace with [method Engine.capture_script_backtraces].

method.name: get_local_variable_name
method.description: Returns the name of the local variable at the specified [param variable_index] in the stack frame at the specified [param frame_index].

method.name: get_local_variable_value
method.description: Returns the [String] value of the local variable at the specified [param variable_index] in the stack frame at the specified [param frame_index].

method.name: get_member_variable_count
method.description: Returns the number of member variables in the stack frame at the specified index. [b]Note:[/b] This will be non-zero only if the [code]include_variables[/code] parameter was [code]true[/code] when capturing the backtrace with [method Engine.capture_script_backtraces].

method.name: get_member_variable_name
method.description: Returns the name of the member variable at the specified [param variable_index] in the stack frame at the specified [param frame_index].

method.name: get_member_variable_value
method.description: Returns the [String] value of the member variable at the specified [param variable_index] in the stack frame at the specified [param frame_index].
